clause_ref: ISO 19650-3:2020 — Operational phase of the assets
_title: ISO 19650-3 — Operational phase asset information management
_note: Part 3 extends Part 2 process to the operational phase (post-handover). AIM (Asset Information Model) becomes the primary information container.

operational_stages.1_handover: PIM delivered + transitioned to AIM at the start of operational phase
operational_stages.2_trigger_events: Maintenance, refurbishment, retrofit, or sale triggers information exchanges
operational_stages.3_information_update: AIM updated to reflect changes during operations

AIM_management.responsible_party: Asset operator (or facility manager appointed by the asset owner)
AIM_management.common_storage: CDE configured for operational phase (often distinct from delivery-phase CDE)
